name: The Phantom Knights of Mist Claws
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影騎士団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミストクロウズ
desc: Target 1 of your banished "The Phantom Knights" monsters; add it to your hand. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack while this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "The Phantom Knights" monster in your GY; Special Summon that monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster with the same original Level as that monster (Warrior/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap.) If Summoned this way, banish this card when it leaves the field.
eff: Target 1 of your banished "The Phantom Knights" monsters; add it to your hand. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack while this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "The Phantom Knights" monster in your GY; Special Summon that monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster with the same original Level as that monster (Warrior/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap.) If Summoned this way, banish this card when it leaves the field.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
